common.motto: Find your partner. Build your future. Grow together.
common.comingSoonBody: This part of your journey is being crafted with the same care as the rest. It arrives in an upcoming release.

trust.valuesCaption: Guided by faith, built on trust
trust.marriageCaption: Designed for a purpose that truly matters

validation.displayName: Please enter your name (at least 2 characters).
validation.password: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.minAge: You must be at least {{minAge}} years old.

gate.title: Verify your identity to continue
gate.body: Matching, interests, and communication unlock once your identity is verified — this keeps the community safe and serious.

verify.title: Identity verification
verify.subtitle: A quick, private check that keeps the community safe and serious.
verify.intro: Upload a government-issued ID. Your documents are encrypted, stored privately, and reviewed only for verification — never shown on your profile.
verify.selfieHint: A selfie helps us match you to your ID faster.
verify.fileHint: JPG, PNG, WebP or PDF, up to 10 MB.
verify.privacy: Private & encrypted — used only to verify your identity.
verify.pendingBody: Thanks — your documents are being reviewed. This usually takes a short while, and your status will update here.
verify.verifiedBody: Your identity is confirmed. Matching and communication are now unlocked.
verify.rejectedBody: We couldn't verify your documents. Please review and submit again.
verify.errorFile: Use a JPG, PNG, WebP or PDF up to 10 MB.
verify.errorService: The verification service isn't available yet. Please try again later.

chat.emptyBody: This is the Introduction stage — text only, and kept respectful. Say salaam and share why you felt this could be a match.
chat.quotaReached: You've used all your introduction messages for now.
chat.contactBlocked: Contact details can't be shared before the Family stage. Please keep it on-platform for now.
chat.blockedInappropriate: That message can't be sent — please keep the conversation respectful.
chat.blockedTooSoon: Let's keep the introduction respectful and unhurried — that can come later, insha'Allah.
chat.blockedMeeting: Private meetings aren't arranged here. Families are involved at the Family stage, insha'Allah.
chat.blockedScam: Money or payment requests aren't allowed on Mithaq. This has been recorded.
chat.moderationUnavailable: Safety review is temporarily unavailable, so your message wasn't sent. Please try again shortly.
chat.notAvailable: Messaging isn't available for this connection yet.

introduction: Assalamu alaikum. What first made you consider marriage at this point in your life?
How would you describe your family, and how involved are they in your decisions?
What does practising your faith look like day to day for you?
What are you hoping to build with a spouse in the first few years?
serious_communication: How do you picture our responsibilities being shared in a household?
What are your thoughts on children — how many, and when?
How do you handle disagreement when you feel strongly about something?
Where would you want us to live, and how would your family feel about it?
family: When would be a good time for our families to speak with each other?
How do you and your family usually approach the mahr and the wedding?
What would you like my family to know about you first?
Shall we plan a meeting with our families present, insha'Allah?
married: What are our goals for this year, insha'Allah?
How should we plan our finances together?
What can I do to make things easier for you this week?
How do you want us to handle disagreements when they come?

voice.micDenied: We couldn't reach your microphone. Check the browser's permission.
voice.sendError: Couldn't send that voice note. Please try again.
voice.unavailable: Voice notes are reviewed before delivery, and the review service isn't available right now. Your note wasn't sent.

media.reviewNote: Photos are checked before they're delivered.
media.unsupported: Use a JPG, PNG or WebP photo.
media.sendError: Couldn't send that photo. Please try again.

plans.title: Choose your membership
plans.subtitle: A paid membership opens the Serious stage, photo access, and deeper compatibility tools.

feature.photos: See members' photos (per their privacy setting)

plans.cardSoon: Card payments arrive once the gateway is connected. Manual payment works today.
plans.methodTitle: How would you like to pay?
plans.methodBody: Choose a method and we'll give you a reference code. Send the amount, then upload your receipt — an admin activates your membership after checking it.
plans.claimError: Couldn't start that payment. You may already have one under review.
plans.pendingFallback: Send the amount using your reference code, then upload the receipt below.
plans.receiptNeeded: We can't activate your membership until we see the receipt.
plans.receiptReceived: Receipt received — an admin will review it shortly.
plans.uploadError: Couldn't upload that file. Use a JPG, PNG, WebP or PDF up to 5 MB.

coupon.label: Coupon code
coupon.coupon_exhausted: That code has been fully used.
coupon.coupon_wrong_plan: That code does not apply to this membership.

payments.emptyBody: Manual payment claims appear here as soon as members submit them.

overview.moderationHint: Verdicts only. No conversation is readable from here.

settings.invalid: This must be a valid {{type}} value.

users.manageBody: Changing the status of {{name}}. Every change is recorded in the audit log.
users.daysHint: Leave at 0 for an indefinite suspension.

verification.emptyBody: Verification requests appear here as members submit them.
verification.reasonPlaceholder: Reason (shown to the member if rejected)
verification.rejectHint: Document links expire in ten minutes, and opening this queue is recorded in the audit log.

detail.ai_enabled_but_no_key: AI moderation is ON but there is no API key — every message is being blocked right now. Fund the key, or switch moderation_ai_enabled off.
detail.local_only: Running on the local pre-filter only (no AI).
detail.never fetched: Never fetched — finance figures may be converting at seeded rates.

analytics.funnelHint: Where connections actually stop. The number worth acting on is the one that drops.
analytics.noAi: No AI calls in this period.

guardians.title: Your guardian
guardians.subtitle: Invite one trusted guardian, then choose exactly which connections they may see.
guardians.notEligibleTitle: Guardians are invited by the woman
guardians.notEligibleBody: In the Family stage, she invites her guardian and decides what they see. You'll be introduced to them there.
guardians.inviteBody: Your guardian creates an account, enters the code you give them, and confirms they're authorised to act on your behalf. They can never browse the platform — they only see what you share.
guardians.name: Their name (optional)
guardians.contactPlaceholder: So you remember who you invited
guardians.inviteError: Couldn't create the invitation. You may already have one open.
guardians.pendingBody: Share this code with {{name}}. They sign up, open Guardian access, and enter it. The code is private — send it the way you'd send anything personal.
guardians.disclaimer: The relationship is declared by you and confirmed by them. Mithaq does not independently verify family relationships or legal guardianship.
guardians.sharingBody: Share a connection with {{name}} to involve them. Sharing is required before the Family stage, and you can revoke it at any time.
guardians.noConnections: You have no connections to share yet.

accept.title: Accept a guardian invitation
accept.subtitle: Enter the code you were given and confirm your role.
accept.declaration: I declare that I am authorised by her to act as her guardian or family representative in this matter.
accept.invalid: That code isn't valid. Check it and try again.
accept.expired: That code has expired. Ask her to send a new one.
accept.error: Couldn't accept the invitation. Please try again.

guardianView.subtitle: Only the connections shared with you appear here.
guardianView.emptyBody: When she shares a connection with you, it appears here. You can't browse the platform or search for anyone.
guardianView.privacyNote: You see only what she chooses to share, and she can revoke access at any time.

journey.explain: Moving to {{next}} needs both of you to agree.
journey.finalStage: You've reached the final stage of the journey.
journey.endBody: This ends your connection with {{name}} and closes the conversation. It can't be undone, and you won't be able to re-request for a while.
journey.seriousNotice: Contact details and meeting arrangements stay closed until the Family stage, when a guardian joins.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Preferences, privacy, and your account.
settings.notificationsBody: Choose what you hear about, how often, and when to stay quiet.
settings.exportBody: Everything the platform holds about you, as a single file. Messages other people sent you are their words, not your data, and are not included.
settings.exportError: Could not prepare your data. Please try again.
settings.deleteBody: Permanent. Your identity documents are erased, your profile is removed, and your connections end.
settings.deleteWarning: This cannot be undone. When you confirm:

deleteBullet.documents: Your identity documents are deleted from storage immediately.
deleteBullet.profile: Your profile is erased and can no longer be found by anyone.
deleteBullet.matches: Your connections end, so nobody is left waiting for a reply.
deleteBullet.records: Payment and audit records are kept as the law requires, but no longer point to you.

settings.deleteError: Could not delete your account. Please try again.

legal.updated: Last updated 14 July 2026. These documents describe what the platform actually does. If anything here does not match your experience, that is a bug — please tell us.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: What you agree to by using Mithaq.

sections.heading: What Mithaq is
sections.body: Mithaq is a platform for people seeking marriage. It is not a dating app. Every connection here moves through defined stages — Introduction, Serious Communication, Family, and Marriage — and the platform is built around that intent.

sections.heading: Who may use it
sections.body: You must be at or above the minimum age for your region, and you must verify your identity before you can be matched with anyone. You may hold one account. You must give true information about yourself: this platform exists so that people can trust what they read here.

sections.heading: How you must behave
sections.body: Treat every member with respect. Do not harass, deceive, threaten, or pressure anyone. Do not use this platform for anything other than seeking marriage. Breaking these rules can suspend or end your account — see the Community Rules for detail.

sections.heading: Moderation
sections.body: Messages are checked before they are delivered. Contact details, romantic language before it is appropriate, and attempts to move off the platform are blocked in the early stages. This is not a suggestion — it is enforced by the system, and it applies to everyone equally.

sections.heading: Membership and payments
sections.body: Some features require a paid membership. Prices are shown before you pay. Manual payments (OMT, Whish, bank transfer) are reviewed by a person and activated once confirmed. If a payment cannot be verified, we will tell you why.

sections.heading: Ending your account
sections.body: You may delete your account at any time, from Settings. Deletion is immediate and permanent. We may suspend or end an account that breaks these terms.

sections.heading: What we do not promise
sections.body: We do not promise that you will find a spouse. We do not verify claims that we cannot check — for example, a declared family relationship is confirmed by the person named, not proven by us, and we say so wherever it appears.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: What we hold, who can see it, and what we delete.

sections.heading: What we hold
sections.body: Your profile, your photos, your identity documents, your messages, your finance entries if you use that feature, and your assistant conversations if you use that one.

sections.heading: Your identity documents
sections.body: They are stored privately and are never public. Only authorised administrators can open them, every time they do so is recorded, and the documents are deleted automatically after your verification succeeds. If you delete your account, they are erased immediately.

sections.heading: Your messages
sections.body: Messages are checked by an automated moderator before delivery. Administrators cannot browse your conversations — there is no screen in this platform that lets them. Moderation is reviewed from verdicts (what was blocked, and why), not from your words.

sections.heading: Your finances
sections.body: Your income and expenses are yours alone. Administrators cannot read them; there is no policy in the database that would allow it. If you and your spouse connect Couple Finance, you share monthly totals — never individual entries — and either of you can disconnect at any time, alone.

sections.heading: The assistant
sections.body: Your assistant conversations are private. The assistant is given your own profile and your journey stage, and nothing about the other person — not their profile, not your messages with them. You can delete your assistant history and its memory yourself, without asking us.

sections.heading: Your guardian
sections.body: A guardian sees only the connections you explicitly share with them, one at a time, and you can revoke that at any moment. They cannot browse the platform, search members, or read anything you have not shared.

sections.heading: Taking your data, and leaving
sections.body: You can download everything we hold about you, as a file, from Settings. You can delete your account from the same place. We keep payment and audit records after deletion because the law requires it, but they no longer point to you.

rules.title: Community Rules
rules.subtitle: The behaviour this platform exists to protect.

sections.heading: Be here for marriage
sections.body: This is not a place to make friends, pass time, or look for anything other than a spouse. If that is not why you are here, this is the wrong platform.

sections.heading: Be truthful
sections.body: Do not misrepresent your age, marital status, intentions, or circumstances. Someone is making one of the largest decisions of their life on the basis of what you tell them.

sections.heading: Respect the stages
sections.body: Contact details and romantic language are blocked before the Family stage, and this is enforced by the system. Do not try to work around it — asking someone to move to another app is a violation, whether or not the words get through.

sections.heading: Respect a "no"
sections.body: If someone declines your interest or ends a connection, that is the end of it. Do not try to reach them another way.

sections.heading: Never pressure, deceive, or extort
sections.body: Threats, blackmail, financial scams, and pressure of any kind will end your account immediately and permanently. If someone does this to you, report it — you are not the one in trouble.

sections.heading: What happens when a rule is broken
sections.body: Depending on severity: a warning, a temporary suspension, or a permanent ban. Serious violations skip straight to the end. Every decision is recorded.
